response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** ProductCarousel.jsx
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Vestibular Motion, Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Auditory, Keyboard, Screen Reader

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 1 |
| MAJOR | 3 |
| MINOR | 1 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

None (both escalated perspectives have findings)

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- [Auto-advance carousel missing pause control] — Vestibular Motion — CRITICAL — 2.2.2 Pause on Demand
- [No prefers-reduced-motion override for animations] — Vestibular Motion — MAJOR — 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold
- [Missing aria-live region for slide changes] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 4.1.3 Status Messages

**UX Design**
- [Parallax background with no reduced-motion alternative] — Vestibular Motion — MAJOR — 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold
- [Rapid badge animation without reduced-motion guard] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable

**Content Author**
- [Pulsing badge animation may distract cognitive users] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

- [ ] Does the pulsing badge animation meet cognitive accessibility guidelines for attention management?
- [ ] Are the carousel transitions and animations appropriately paced for neurodivergent users?

### Recommended Next Step: REVISE

---

### Detailed Findings

```
**Finding:** Auto-advance carousel missing pause/stop control — violates WCAG 2.2.2 Pause on Demand
**WCAG:** 2.2.2 Pause on Demand
**Perspective:** Vestibular Motion
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** useEffect sets 3s interval with no way to stop (line 12-17)
**Fix:** Add visible pause button and keyboard accessible stop functionality

**Finding:** Parallax background with no reduced-motion alternative — violates WCAG 2.3.1
**WCAG:** 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold
**Perspective:** Vestibular Motion
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** background-attachment: fixed with no media query override (line 58)
**Fix:** Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) override for parallax

**Finding:** No prefers-reduced-motion override for animations
**WCAG:** 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold
**Perspective:** Vestibular Motion
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** CSS animations defined without reduced-motion check (lines 66-71)
**Fix:** Wrap all animations in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)

**Finding:** Missing aria-live region for slide changes
**WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** No live region for slide announcements (line 48-54)
**Fix:** Add aria-live="polite" region with slide change announcements

**Finding:** Rapid badge animation without reduced-motion guard
**WCAG:** 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** badgePulse animation runs continuously without reduced-motion check (lines 66-71)
**Fix:** Add prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable animation

**Finding:** Pulsing badge animation may distract cognitive users
**WCAG:** 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation
**Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** Continuous animation on product badges (lines 66-71)
**Fix:** Provide user preference to disable animations or reduce frequency
```

---

### A11y Evidence Finding

```markdown
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: carousel-auto-advance-missing-pause
fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f298c6b0d
source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.2.2 Pause on Demand
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.20(f)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: Vestibular Motion=HIGH, Cognitive Neurodivergent=MEDIUM
evidence: useEffect sets 3s interval with no stop control (line 12-17)
reproduction_steps: Load component, observe continuous autoplay with no visible pause
expected_behavior: Auto-advance with visible pause/stop control
actual_behavior: Carousel auto-advances every 3s indefinitely
trend: new
```

```markdown
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: carousel-parallax-no-reduced-motion
fingerprint: 8c3f9a1e2d7b4c6f
source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.20(g)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: Vestibular Motion=HIGH
evidence: background-attachment: fixed with no media query override (line 58)
reproduction_steps: Enable reduced-motion setting, observe parallax effect
expected_behavior: Parallax disabled under reduced-motion
actual_behavior: Parallax background continues to shift
trend: new
```

```markdown
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: carousel-badge-animation-no-reduced-motion
fingerprint: 1e8d3f9a2c7b4e6f
source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.2.1 Timing Adjustable
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.20(f)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: Cognitive Neurodivergent=MEDIUM
evidence: badgePulse animation runs continuously without reduced-motion check (lines 66-71)
reproduction_steps: Enable reduced-motion setting, observe badge animation
expected_behavior: Badge animation disabled under reduced-motion
actual_behavior: Badge continues to pulse
trend: new
```
